name: Semantic Drag-And-Drop Absurdity
description: Use two physical probes to discover transient material responses, then route each specimen to its causal twin.
natural_language: Probe the specimens. Route each response to its twin.

metadata.notes: V2 removes image classification. Each unlabeled specimen must be held under thermal and polarity probes; only transient physical responses reveal the matching receiver. Probes and placements are independently graded.
